<!-- Thanks for contributing. Keep it focused: one change per PR. -->

## What this changes

<!-- A short, plain description of the change and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] New preset (palette and type)
- [ ] Layout or component pattern
- [ ] Script fix or improvement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Checks

- [ ] I kept the copy simple, with no em-dashes.
- [ ] If I changed a palette, I ran `scripts/check_contrast.py` and it exits clean.
- [ ] If I added or edited an SVG, I ran `scripts/validate_assets.py` and it passes.
- [ ] The change does not make the skill violate its own anti-slop checklist.

## Related issue

<!-- Link an issue if there is one, e.g. Closes #12 -->
